'''ASP-704''' was a [[Gender/Legends|masculine]] [[ASP-7 labor droid/Legends|ASP-7 labor droid]] imported by [[Eugene Talmont]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Prefect/Legends|prefect]] of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. It was tasked with loading cargo aboard a [[GR-45 medium transport/Legends|GR-45 medium transport]]. After being taunted by [[IM4-099]], ASP-704 simply slapped IM4-099, sending it to the ground.

==Appearances==
